summary_one_line: A Devanagari glyph 0x0905 immediately followed by a second glyph whose codepoint equals one of the listed vowel case constants (0x093A/0x093B/0x093E/0x0945...).

hypotheses.what_input_feature: A glyph sequence where the current glyph codepoint is 0x0905 and the next glyph codepoint (buffer->cur(1)) equals one of the 16-bit case constants 0x093Au/0x093Bu/0x093Eu/0x0945u (and the following lines 0x0946..0x0957), reached only after the buffer script is decoded as HB_SCRIPT_DEVANAGARI.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: The winner-resolving seed begins with 05 09 00 00 3b 09, i.e. little-endian codepoint 0x0905 followed by 0x093B, exactly the (0x0905, 0x093Bu) pair that drives the inner switch into the blocker true side; value_profile took the branch in 9/10 trials.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: The loser seeds reach the 0x0905 outer case but their second codepoint never lands on a listed vowel: e.g. seed 2 is 05 09 00 00 05 09 (next codepoint 0x0905, not a vowel) and seed 3 stacks 0x093A bytes loosely (40 09 3a 3a...) without forming a clean 0x0905-then-vowel adjacency, so the inner switch falls through (F=6) and naive resolved in only 1/10.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: value_profile intercepts the integer CMP that compares buffer->cur(1).codepoint against each 16-bit case constant and writes a Hamming-distance bucket into CMP_MAP; an input whose second codepoint is closer to a target vowel adds a new CMP_MAP bucket and is preserved, giving a gradient that walks the 16-bit value onto an exact case constant. naive lacks CMP interception so must hit the exact 16-bit value by blind havoc.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is the inner switch case matching buffer->cur(1).codepoint against the vowel constants under the 0x0905 outer case, in the Devanagari arm.
Reaching the blocker requires the buffer script to be HB_SCRIPT_DEVANAGARI.
The winner-resolving seed starts with little-endian 0x0905 then 0x093B, the exact pair feeding the blocker true side.
value_profile resolved the branch in 9/10 trials while naive resolved in only 1/10.
A loser seed reaches the 0x0905 region but its second codepoint is 0x0905, not a listed vowel.
Loser executions fall through the inner vowel switch (false side counted 6 times) at the blocker line.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: d=1   L  67  T=0 F=1  T=0 F=6  case 0x093Au: case 0x093Bu: case 0x093Eu: case 0x0945u:  <-- BLOCKER

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile intercepts integer CMPs and writes a Hamming-distance bucket into CMP_MAP, preserving inputs that get operands closer to matching.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
An input that produces a
CMP-operand pair closer to matching than any previously-seen pair
adds a new CMP_MAP bucket and is preserved as corpus.

evidence_trail.claim: naive has no CMP interception and only edge-counter feedback plus havoc mutators.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: **Observed `mutation_op` in seed metadata**: any of the above. No I2S.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: claimed_mechanism is CMP_MAP gradient (value_profile winner, not cmplog/I2SRandReplace), so a lineage I2S-floor query is not applicable; the winner is value_profile per DECISIVE PAIRS and value_profile carries no I2SRandReplace per MECHANISM CONTEXT, so no dash-row check is required.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness where the second-glyph codepoint is compared to the vowel constants via a CMP that value_profile cannot improve (e.g. exact-equality on a value with no Hamming gradient toward the target) yet value_profile still resolves it far more than naive — showing the CMP_MAP gradient is not what carries the winner.

weakest_evidence_point: Only one winner-resolving seed is shown, so the claimed CMP_MAP gradient toward a 16-bit vowel constant is inferred from source + a single byte pattern rather than from multiple converging seeds or explicit operand-distance metadata.
